raw_consumer_statement: I got a small game from plays station though XXXX, it was a third party vendor, I bought it in XX/XX/XXXX it was delivered XX/XX/XXXX, I returned in XXXX XXXX XXXX, CA, in customer service XX/XX/XXXX at morning and nationwide distributor got it in XX/XX/XXXX, I didn't received my money back to my card and I email to XXXX about the refund and they said the box was broken, I asked for the video camera because it was perfect when I retuned it, I stared a dispute with citi bank because it was a citi credit card in XX/XX/XXXX and they just closed it XXXX XXXX with the disputed denied, I tried to talk to XXXX again and They continued with We going to give your refund, it's been almost 2 months and I don't have anything, I don't have my money back, I don't have the game, nobody want to help me, I'm thinking about to going to the police
